title: Select Lists
text: Select Lists A select list is an indexed list of fields that are available after a read or retrieve statement. Initially, the select list is equal to the field list, which is a list of all fields associated with a component as known at compilation time. For individual queries, a subset of the field list can be defined as the select list. When an occurrence is retrieved from the database, and the select list is a subset of the field list (that is, there are some fields that are not requested), the fields not in the select list remain empty. These fields can be modified in the component, but changes are not written to the database. Related Links Field Lists A component's field list determines how Uniface manages the fields when retrieving occurrences into the component at runtime. The field list includes not only the fields that are part of the component data structure, but also other fields that may be required, for example, because they are referenced in ProcScript or part of a key. Order of Fields in an Entity The order of fields in an entity influences performance because of a Uniface feature called field sub-setting, in which Uniface groups the fields in an occurrence into subsets of adjacent fields and then either formats these as groups or not. $subsetreturn Return only the most recently retrieved occurrences of an entity to its operation entity parameter.
